body_excerpt: In ConvertReductionOp of darwinn_mlir_converter_aidl.cc, there is a possible out of bounds write due to a heap buffer overflow. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: In ConvertReductionOp of darwinn_mlir_converter_aidl.cc, there is a possible out of bounds write due to a heap buffer overflow. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional exec
